prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约230名、7850名（2022年出现异常大幅后移，可能与当年招生批次调整或断档有关）、432名、490名、576名。近三年（ 2023–2025）位次呈小幅逐年后移趋势，从432名逐步后移至576名，累计后移约144名；2025年基准位次约576名；该校在贵州省该科类招生计划持续扩增：2021 年13人、2022年13人、2023年15人、2024年17人、2025年20人；2026年计划进一步扩至25人（较2025年增加5人，扩幅25%），扩招力度明显，有助于缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次 后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院为985、211、双一流高校，隶属上海交通大学（软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第4名），属国内顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极 强，位次下移空间受限于学校品牌效应；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、师德师风及学术不端相关舆情，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生 轻微抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A+）、口腔医学（ A+）为全国顶尖水平，护理学（A-）等也实力突出；招生专业均属临床医学大类（含八年制本博连读、五年制、儿科学等），学科评估等级极高，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于上海市，属跨省招生；贵州考生对东部沿海优质医学教育资源有较强向往，地域偏好对报考热度有正向支撑；临床医学2024年专业热度评估为"推荐"（偏热），口腔医学为"推荐"（偏热），医学类专业整体社会热度维持高位；贵州省2026年高考总报名人数约29.9万，按近 年物理类占比约67%估算，物理类考生约20万人，与2025年基本持平，考生规模变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次576名、2026年招生计划扩招25%（推动位次后移） 、学校顶尖层次与王牌医学学科（限制位次过度下移）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）及考生规模基本持平，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移，预测最低位次约677名，波 动区间596–758名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 儿科学（卓越班）（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（临床方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约677名，区间596–758名。位次在区间下限（596名）以内可重点冲刺一档临床医学八年制本博连读；位次在预测值附近建议以二档口腔医学（5+3一体化）和临床医学 五年制为主；位次在区间上限（758名）附近可考虑三档儿科学卓越班或医学试验班作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 230, 7850 (an abnormal large backward shift in 2022, possibly due to batch adjustment or gap), 432, 490, and 576. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings showed a slight year-by-year backward trend, moving from 432 to 576, with a cumulative backward shift of about 144 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 576; the university's enrollment plan for this category in Guizhou Province has been continuously expanding: 13 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan further expands to 25 (an increase of 5 from 2025, a 25% expansion), with a significant expansion intensity, helping to alleviate competition pressure and push the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (ranked 4th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with strong attraction for high-scoring candidates, limiting the downward space of rankings due to the brand effect; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving school management, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct related public opinion, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; no obvious enrollment gap records; Clinical Medicine (A+) and Stomatology (A+) are at the national top level, Nursing (A-) and others are also strong; the enrollment majors are all in the clinical medicine category (including eight-year MD-PhD program, five-year program, pediatrics, etc.), with extremely high discipline evaluation levels, providing continuous attraction for candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial enrollment; Guizhou candidates have a strong desire for high-quality medical education resources on the eastern coast, and regional preference positively supports application enthusiasm; Clinical Medicine's 2024 major popularity evaluation is 'recommended' (relatively hot), Stomatology is 'recommended' (relatively hot), and the overall social popularity of medical majors remains high; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 college entrance examination in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 67%, resulting in about 200,000 physics category candidates, basically unchanged from 2025, with little change in candidate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 576, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 25% (pushing rankings backward), the university's top tier and flagship medical disciplines (limiting excessive downward movement), slightly negative reputation (slight inhibition), and basically unchanged candidate scale, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 677, and a fluctuation range of 596–758.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD-PhD Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Pediatrics (Excellence Class) (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 677, range 596–758. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (596) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year MD-PhD Program; those near the predicted value are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program) and Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program; those near the upper limit (758) can consider Tier 3 Pediatrics Excellence Class or Medical Experimental Class as a safety option.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
